deals.Description: A Barcelona-based startup that develops AI agent testing solutions. It helps companies ensure their AI systems are safe, compliant, and trustworthy before deployment.
deals.Investors: 42CAP, Mozilla Ventures, JME Ventures, Masia, ABAC Nest Ventures

deals.Description: A Barcelona-based crypto startup offering an institutional tokenization platform. It enables financial institutions to digitize and manage real-world assets compliantly.
An Aragonese company specializing in digital language education. It is developing a new platform integrating AI and immersive experiences to enhance learning.
A Spanish company focused on making artificial intelligence more reliable in engineering. It specializes in the verification of AI used in engineering applications.
Company dedicated to corporate accommodation in Spain and Southern Europe, investing in AI for reservation management.
deals.Investors: Barlon Capital, Roch Ventures, Telegraph Hill Capital, Finaves, Endra Capital

deals.Description: Startup working with lithium batteries, focusing on sustainable batteries in Europe.
Spanish startup in humanitarian technology, strengthening and scaling its B2G platform for emergency management.
Tech spin-off from the University of Granada specialized in applying artificial intelligence to biomedical research.
An AI-driven hospital data automation platform based in Barcelona. It aims to streamline data processes within healthcare facilities.
A Barcelona-based deep tech company applying Quantum Mechanics and Artificial Intelligence for drug discovery. They develop disruptive Computer-Aided Drug Design (CADD) software solutions.
deals.Founders: Enric Gibert, Javier Luque, Enric Herrero

deals.Description: An AI-powered digital taxation platform based in Madrid that helps users file income tax returns easily and maximize savings by identifying deductions.
An AI-powered payroll and HR platform for high-turnover teams based in Barcelona. It simplifies contracts, payroll, tax filings, and Social Security processes.

An Earth data infrastructure company building a global record system for physical change on Earth. It creates a satellite constellation to map the earth for AI and provide high-precision Earth data infrastructure tailored for artificial intelligence applications.
deals.Investors: Nazca Capital, MCH Private Equity, CDTI, Buenavista Equity Partners, Endeavor Catalyst

deals.Description: A Spanish startup specializing in corporate digital identity and verifiable credentials, developing a platform to issue, share, and verify digital certificates linked to company identity, facilitating secure information exchange and digitalization of enterprise verification processes. Their platform enables organizations to issue, manage, and verify digital certificates, aligning with the emerging European Business Wallet model and focusing on sustainability-related certifications.
deals.Investors: Spanish Society for Technological Transformation (SETT), Repsol, Grupo Synaptia, Bolboreta Innova Group, Tritemius, Venturade, Chromata Invest

deals.Description: A Spanish startup specializing in external intelligence and advanced OSINT, which has developed an anticipatory intelligence operating system to detect complex dynamics in informational, geopolitical, and business environments. Its technology combines advanced OSINT, multi-source fusion, and multi-agent orchestration to transform fragmented signals into structured, traceable, and actionable intelligence.
deals.Investors: First Drop, Business Angels, Empresa Nacional de Innovación (Enisa), Centro para el Desarrollo Tecnológico y la Innovación (CDTI)

deals.Description: SaaS platform utilizing AI agents for customer service and process automation, centralizing messages and executing actions in external applications.
deals.Investors: 4Founders Capital, Addendum Capital, Juan Pablo Tejela, Gonzalo Urculo, Juan Castillo

deals.Description: A citizen empowerment platform that enables the creation, scaling, and sustenance of citizen movements, with plans to develop an agentic AI system.
deals.Investors: Miguel Vicente, Vincent Rosso, David Tomás, Marta Huidobro, Ignacio Carnero, Sergi Figueres, Diego Hidalgo, Ricard Jornet, Alejandro Castellano, David García Lancharro, Álex Rodríguez Ruibal

deals.Country: Spain (founded by Spanish entrepreneurs, based in New York)
deals.Description: Automates procurement and supply chain operations using AI agents to execute work, not just analyze it.
deals.Investors: Base10, Kfund, Clara Ventures, Masia Ventures, a16z scouts, several business angels

deals.Description: Develops dual-use technology for security, defense, and business environments, focusing on expanding capabilities over unindexed data sources.
Develops AI agent technology. The company is based in Barcelona and San Francisco.
